zh.Clisson, Loire Atlantigue, Bretagne, Fra: 法國洛易-易費利額可利頌
zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix de Clisson Comtesse de Porhoet於1356年出生在法國洛易-易費利額可利頌時，她的父親Olivier V de Clisson20歲，母親Catherine de Laval30歲。她於1380年與Alain VIII, sire de Léon, Vicomte de 1396 à 1429 de Rohan在法國o-阿爾培斯洛易結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1448年1月1日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可可利頌享年92歲，埋葬在法國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix de Clisson Comtesse de Porhoet于1356年出生在法国洛易-易費利額可利頌时，她的父亲Olivier V de Clisson20岁，母亲Catherine de Laval30岁。她于1380年与Alain VIII, sire de Léon, Vicomte de 1396 à 1429 de Rohan在法国o-阿爾培斯洛易结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1448年1月1日在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可可利頌享年92岁，埋葬在法国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clisson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a pet form of the personal name Closs, an old variant of Claus , a name of German and Flemish (Dutch) origin.

variants.name: Clawson
meanings: Americanized form of North German, Danish, and Norwegian Clausen , Claussen , or Klausen , and also of their Dutch cognates, such as Claassen or Klaassen, patronymics from short forms of the local equivalents of the personal name Nicholas . Compare Clauson .

nameMeanings.name: de

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix de Clisson Comtesse de Porhoet was born in 1356, in Clisson, Loire-Inférieure, France, her father, Olivier V de Clisson, was 20 and her mother, Catherine de Laval, was 30. She married Alain VIII, sire de Léon, Vicomte de 1396 à 1429 de Rohan in 1380, in Loire, Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 1 January 1448, in Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 92, and was buried in France.

fr.Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Lo: Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix de Clisson Comtesse de Porhoet est née en 1356, à Clisson, Loire-Inférieure, France, son père, Olivier V de Clisson, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Catherine de Laval, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Alain VIII, sire de Léon, Vicomte de 1396 à 1429 de Rohan en 1380, à Loire, Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 janvier 1448, à Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 92 ans, et a été enterrée à France.

de.Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Lo: Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix de Clisson Comtesse de Porhoet 1356 in Clisson, Loire-Inférieure, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Olivier V de Clisson 20 und ihre Mutter Catherine de Laval 30. Sie hat 1380 in Loire, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Alain VIII, sire de Léon, Vicomte de 1396 à 1429 de Rohan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Januar 1448 im Alter von 92 Jahren in Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Frankreich begraben.

Lei sposato Alain VIII, sire de Léon, Vicomte de 1396 à 1429 de Rohan nel 1380, nel Loire, Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 1 gennaio 1448, nel Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 92 anni, e fu sepolta a Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Clisson Comtesse de Porhoetが1356年にフランスロイアーエ-インフeリーウアクリソンで生まれた時，父Olivier V de Clissonは20歳，母Catherine de Lavalは30歳であった。1380年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスロイアーでAlain VIII, sire de Léon, Vicomte de 1396 à 1429 de Rohanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1448年1月1日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーロイアーエ-アトランティククリソンで92歳で死去し，フランスにて埋葬された。

ko.Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Lo: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 클리슨
ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Clisson Comtesse de Porhoet(이)가 1356년 프랑스 로이레-인프e리우르 클리슨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Olivier V de Clisson(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine de Laval(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1380년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 로이르에서 Alain VIII, sire de Léon, Vicomte de 1396 à 1429 de Rohan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1448년 1월 1일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 클리슨에서 92세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix de Clisson Comtesse de Porhoet nasceu em 1356, em Clisson, Loire-Inférieure, França, seu pai, Olivier V de Clisson, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Catherine de Laval, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Alain VIII, sire de Léon, Vicomte de 1396 à 1429 de Rohan em 1380, em Loire, Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1448, em Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, França, com 92 anos, e foi sepultada em França.

ru.Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Lo: клиссон, лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix de Clisson Comtesse de Porhoet родилась в 1356 г. в местности клиссон, лоире-инфeриеур, Франция, её отцу по имени Olivier V de Clisson было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine de Laval, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alain VIII, sire de Léon, Vicomte de 1396 à 1429 de Rohan в 1380 г. в местности лоир, рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 1 января 1448 г. в местности клиссон, лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 92 лет и была похоронена в местности Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrix de Clisson Comtesse de Porhoet nació en 1356, en Clisson, Loire-Inférieure, Francia, su papá, Olivier V de Clisson, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Catherine de Laval, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Alain VIII, sire de Léon, Vicomte de 1396 à 1429 de Rohan en 1380, en Loire, Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 1 de enero de 1448, en Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 92 años, y fue sepultada en Francia.
